---
title: "Solution 1C — Classification complexity ladder"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-tools: true
---

**Instructor notes:** Causal trio should beat intercept-only on test sensitivity; full model may overfit (unstable coefficients).

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(rpart)
```

```{r simulate}
set.seed(123)
n <- 200
p <- 10
gene_names <- paste0("Gene", 1:p)
genes_data <- data.frame(matrix(rnorm(n * p), nrow = n))
colnames(genes_data) <- gene_names
disease_presence <- ifelse(
  0.5 * genes_data$Gene1 + 0.8 * genes_data$Gene3 - 0.3 * genes_data$Gene4 -
    genes_data$Gene1 * genes_data$Gene3 * 2 + rnorm(n, sd = 0.5) > 0,
  1, 0
)
disease_presence <- factor(disease_presence, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("Absent", "Present"))
bio_data <- data.frame(genes_data, disease_presence)
```

```{r split}
set.seed(789)
idx <- sample(seq_len(n), floor(0.8 * n))
train <- bio_data[idx, ]
test <- bio_data[-idx, ]
```

```{r glm-models}
eval_glm <- function(formula, label) {
  m <- glm(formula, data = train, family = binomial)
  prob <- predict(m, test, type = "response")
  pred <- factor(ifelse(prob > 0.5, "Present", "Absent"), levels = c("Absent", "Present"))
  tab <- table(truth = test$disease_presence, pred = pred)
  acc <- sum(diag(tab)) / sum(tab)
  sens <- tab["Present", "Present"] / sum(tab["Present", ])
  list(label = label, accuracy = acc, sensitivity = sens, tab = tab)
}

res_null <- eval_glm(disease_presence ~ 1, "Null")
res_causal <- eval_glm(disease_presence ~ Gene1 + Gene3 + Gene4, "Causal trio")
res_full <- eval_glm(disease_presence ~ ., "All genes")

tibble(
  model = c(res_null$label, res_causal$label, res_full$label),
  accuracy = c(res_null$accuracy, res_causal$accuracy, res_full$accuracy),
  sensitivity = c(res_null$sensitivity, res_causal$sensitivity, res_full$sensitivity)
) |> knitr::kable(digits = 3)
```

```{r conf-full}
res_full$tab
```

```{r rpart-cp}
tree_fit <- rpart(disease_presence ~ ., data = train, method = "class", control = rpart.control(cp = 0.01))
cp_tab <- as.data.frame(tree_fit$cptable)
knitr::kable(head(cp_tab, 8), digits = 4)
```

```{r session, echo=FALSE}
sessionInfo()
```
